title: Field-Guide Outcomes, Command Language, and REPL Contract · Runtime Contract: Pokedex Go Acceptance Evidence
summary: A ranger team asks for a Pokedex but has not defined who uses it, which decisions it supports, what commands exist, how sessions end, or what evidence makes the command useful. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go acceptance evidence increment in bounded field-guide product and REPL charter. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Define runnable happy, changed, invalid, EOF, timeout, cancellation, and recovery cases plus exact stakeholder evidence.
Keep prompts, progress, errors, and results understandable without color, animation, pointer input, or fragile terminal width.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
